title: ferray-stats: nan_aware allocates per-lane filter Vec — could use in-place NaN compaction
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

NaN-aware reductions in nan_aware.rs do 'let non_nan: Vec<T> = lane.iter().copied().filter(|x| !x.is_nan()).collect()' for every lane. For a reduction along axis 0 of a (1000, 1000) array, this creates 1000 temporary Vecs. An in-place NaN compaction (partition NaN to end, track count) would avoid allocation. NumPy's nansum etc. use masked iteration via ufunc where= machinery without extra allocation.
